step.title: Load epics
step.action: Read docs/planning-artifacts/epics.md and extract all epics with their acceptance criteria.
If test-plan exists, load it for testing strategy context.

step.title: Write acceptance test scenarios
step.action: For each epic, write acceptance test scenarios in Given/When/Then format.
Cover happy path, error cases, and edge cases.

step.title: Map tests to epics
step.action: Create a mapping from each test scenario to its source epic and acceptance criterion.

step.title: Produce acceptance tests document
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with test scenarios.
